title: How to manage 1000s of contacts
excerpt:
Hello, 
I have a client with over 10,000 contacts in the CRM. What methods have you used to keep contact boards from getting too slow? Currently, the majority of the contacts are in 2 separate boards. What is the optimal…

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I have a client with over 10,000 contacts in the CRM. What methods have you used to keep contact boards from getting too slow? Currently, the majority of the contacts are in 2 separate boards. What is the optimal number of items per board? Is there a sweet spot of “less than “x”” items? I think a board can handle like 10,000 items for Pro Plan?

Thanks,
Charlie

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Charlie,
The new mondayDB is alot more efficient and has support for 100K items per board.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
And there’s even more to come to specific Enterprise monday CRM boards such as Leads and Contacts in the near future.

Currently the limits are indeed:

  • Pro: 10000 items per board
  • Enterprise: 100 000 items per board

See this help article for even more numbers.

Best,

Maarten

posts.author: Jakesmonday (Jake)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah on enterprise accounts!!! Which is overpriced!
